subject: Phase 14 live page output escaping
fact: Live student and volunteer pages that render API response data through innerHTML must escape dynamic values before insertion; Phase 14 reproduced a stored-XSS path through event names and fixed it in the student and volunteer live page scripts.
reason: Future role-page changes can easily reintroduce stored-XSS if API strings are concatenated into innerHTML without escaping, so this should stay explicit in repo memory for later coding and review tasks.
